samples.xml_description:
<module id="counter_12">
    <description>Counter from 0 to 11, controlled by valid_count.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low)</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal</input>
        <input id="valid_count">Enable counting</input>
        <output id="out" width_description="[3:0]">Current count</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state">
            <enum_value>Idle=3'b000</enum_value>
            <enum_value>Counting=3'b001</enum_value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="state_ff" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>State flip-flop</description>
            <input_map>
                <input id="clk"/>
                <input id="rst_n"/>
                <input id="state"/>
            </input_map>
            <output_map>
                <output id="state"/>
            </output_map>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <description>Reset the counter if the reset signal is active. If the valid_count signal is 1, the counter increments. It checks if the current count value (out) is equal to 4d11. If it is, the counter wraps around and resets to 0. Otherwise, it increments the output register by 1.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>
                <description>Reset signal is active</description>
                <input_ref id="rst_n"/>
            </condition>
            <true>
                <description>Reset the counter</description>
                <assign>
                    <description>Reset the counter</description>
                    <assign_lhs>
                        <description>Counter value</description>
                        <output_ref id="out"/>
                    </assign_lhs>
                    <assign_rhs>
                        <description>Reset value</description>
                        <value>4'b0000</value>
                    </assign_rhs>
                </assign>
            </true>
            <false>
                <if>
                    <condition>
                        <description>Valid count signal is active</description>
                        <input_ref id="valid_count"/>
                    </condition>
                    <true>
                        <description>Increment the counter</description>
                        <assign>
                            <description>Increment the counter</description>
                            <assign_lhs>
                                <description>Counter value</description>
                                <output_ref id="out"/>
                            </assign_lhs>
                            <assign_rhs>
                                <description>Incremented value</description>
                                <binary_operator type="add">
                                    <binary_operator_lhs>
                                        <description>Counter value</description>
                                        <output_ref id="out"/>
                                    </binary_operator_lhs>
                                    <binary_operator_rhs>
                                        <description>Increment value</description>
                                        <value>4'b0001</value>
                                    </binary_operator_rhs>
                                </binary_operator>
                            </assign_rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </true>
                    <false>
                        <description>Do nothing</description>
                    </false>
                </if>
            </false>
        </if>
    </implementation>
</module>
